/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libouster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libouster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/ouster_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/ouster_msgs/msg/packet_msg__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
